title: Senior Full Stack Developer & Team Lead
summary: Senior engineer and team lead on a platform powering $3B+ in agri-commodity trades across 82 markets, serving 2,000+ corporate buyers worldwide.
bullets: Own the backend architecture for a multi-tenant trading platform handling real-time market data and complex transaction workflows
Build and maintain RESTful and GraphQL APIs in Node.js and NestJS, serving both the web platform and mobile clients
Lead a team of engineers on backend architecture decisions, code review, and technical direction
Design database schemas across MongoDB and PostgreSQL, optimizing query performance for high-throughput trading operations
Coordinate with frontend engineers building Angular-based trading dashboards for end-to-end feature delivery
Implement caching strategies with Redis and maintain Docker-based deployments with CI/CD pipelines
overview: TradeCafe is a global commodities trading and fulfillment platform that enables buyers and sellers of physical agri-commodities — primarily protein — to execute, finance, and fulfill transactions seamlessly. The platform serves over 2,000 corporate buyers including processors, retailers, and national distributors, and has facilitated over $3 billion in fulfilled trades across 82 markets worldwide. The platform replaces the traditional phone-and-spreadsheet workflow with real-time firm offers 24/7, accessible financing with approval in under 24 hours, and end-to-end fulfillment visibility — cutting admin time by 80%.
impact: Contributing to a platform that has processed $3 billion+ in commodity trades
Serving 2,000+ corporate buyers across 82 global markets
Part of a team fundamentally modernizing how the protein commodity industry operates

title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Senior backend engineer on a 3+ year engagement building and operating a full-featured ERP system on Microsoft Azure for large-scale European furniture manufacturers.
bullets: Designed and developed the complete ERP backend using Node.js and RESTful APIs — modules for product management, inventory, order processing, and reporting
Architected cloud infrastructure on Microsoft Azure — Functions, Cosmos DB, Cognitive Search, Blob Storage, and Compute
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines in Bitbucket, automating the full build-test-deploy cycle across environments
Structured the API layer for multi-tenant isolation, ensuring data security across client organizations
Handled performance optimization cycles as data volumes grew — query tuning, index optimization, and caching
Took ownership of key backend components, contributing architectural decisions and communicating trade-offs with the German-based team
overview: Cekaso GmbH is a German technology company that builds enterprise resource planning (ERP) software for the European furniture industry. Their platform serves large-scale furniture manufacturers and distributors across Europe, managing complex operations spanning inventory, production, logistics, and sales. The companies Cekaso serves needed a modern ERP that could handle massive product catalogs with rich metadata, support multi-tenant operations, provide intelligent search across hundreds of thousands of products, and scale reliably without downtime.
impact: Built and operated the ERP backend powering operations for major European furniture companies
Operated the system reliably across 3+ years, handling production workloads with minimal disruption
Scaled the system to handle production workloads with hundreds of thousands of product records
Collaborated effectively as a remote team member, delivering consistently across a 3+ year cross-border engagement

title: Tech Lead
summary: Designed and built the customer-facing application from the ground up for a fintech SaaS delivering 15 years of historical market data to traders and investors.
bullets: Designed the entire backend architecture from scratch — service boundaries, data flow, API contracts, and infrastructure topology
Chose a polyglot approach with Express.js for the API layer and Flask for data processing, optimizing each for its workload
Built the system to handle bursty load patterns — high query volume during market hours, batch processing overnight
Managed full AWS infrastructure (EC2, Lambda, S3, CloudWatch) and automated CI/CD pipelines
Integrated Stripe for subscription management — plan creation, payment processing, upgrades/downgrades, and failed payment recovery
Implemented observability with CloudWatch for monitoring, alerting, and tracing across services
overview: Spikeet is a financial market data platform that delivers high-quality, historical financial data to traders, investors, and money managers. The product provides 15 years of market data — including technical indicators, fundamental metrics, SEC filings, earnings data, and intraday information — through auto-generated Excel spreadsheets with daily automatic updates. Features include custom filtering across asset types and performance metrics, TradingView-powered interactive charting, an Excel plugin, and tiered subscription plans.
impact: Delivered a production-ready SaaS product from zero to launch
Built a platform capable of serving real-time and historical market data to a growing subscriber base
Established the technical foundation that the company continues to build on

title: Senior Back-End Developer
summary: Built the backend platform for a digital signage company managing ad scheduling and delivery across distributed screens.
bullets: Designed and developed microservices for tracking, scheduling, and delivering ads and postcards across a network of digital screens
Optimized API performance and database efficiency to handle growing traffic volumes without degradation
Deployed and operated services on AWS using ElasticBeanstalk, RDS, CloudWatch, and CloudFront
Built an Angular-based admin dashboard for analytics, ad scheduling, and performance monitoring

title: Android & Backend Developer
summary: Built a mobile-first agricultural platform connecting Ethiopian farmers with verified suppliers, advisory services, and mechanization providers.
bullets: Designed and developed the Android application with offline-first architecture using Room Database and WorkManager for low-connectivity regions
Implemented geo-location matching to connect users with nearby machinery providers and extension agents
Built the Node.js/Express backend powering API communication between the mobile app and server
Set up Jenkins CI/CD pipelines for automated testing, build, and deployment across Android and server codebases

title: Full Stack Developer
summary: First professional role after university — built a ride-hailing platform in collaboration with Honda at one of Ethiopia's leading AI research labs.
bullets: Developed the backend system and management dashboard for a ride-hailing platform built in partnership with Honda
Participated in full-cycle development from requirement gathering and architecture design through to deployment
Implemented route optimization logic to improve trip efficiency and reduce fuel consumption
Designed RESTful APIs for mobile app communication, user authentication, and trip management
